title: Maintenance Associate Engineer
description:
Who We Are:

Lumileds International is a global leader in LED technology, innovation, and solutions for the automotive, display, illumination, mobile, and other markets where light sources are essential. Our approximately 3,300 employees operate in over 15 countries to partner with our customers to deliver solutions for lighting, safety, and well-being.

The Lumileds environment is fast-paced, cutting-edge, intelligent and fun! We are looking for exceptional talent to join our team! To learn more, visit lumileds.com.


Who You Are:

Dynamic, energetic, able to work in an organization within a department and cross-functions.

Position Summary:

Lumileds is seeking for an Associate Engineer to take shift responsibility for operation duties when on-shift, ensuring equipment indices like MTBF, MTTR, uptime are met. Work with equipment, process and industrial engineers and Manufacturing to address issues pertaining to hardware and Corrective Maintenance. Support equipment engineers and vendors on equipment retrofit, upgrades and CIP. Lead and train technicians for Preventive Maintenance. Candidate should at least had worked on wafer fabrication machines such as Plasma Enhanced Chemical Vapour Deposition (PECVD), dry etch, descum, dry strip , asher tools for at least 3 to 5 years.

What You Will Do:                                                                                                                

  • This position reports to PECVD-Dry Etch equipment Senior Engineer / Staff Engineer.

  • The candidate will undergo OJT and will be attached to a mentor or a senior staff. 

  • The candidate will be able to perform various preventive and corrective maintenance and to gain fundamental knowledge in terms of quality/6S/Safety perspective and apply to daily work.

  • Perform Preventive Maintenance (PM) and Troubleshooting of equipment to meet Equipment Indices of MTTR, MTBF and OEE.

  • Candidate must be willing to work rotating 12 hr day / night shift.

  • Establish sufficient essential spares and consumables stock levels to support equipment maintenance.

  • Lead and guide shift technicians on all equipment maintenance. Provide effective equipment trainings to the technicians to build up their technical  competencies.

  • Perform other duties as assigned by the manager/ Supervisor. Duties will vary according to the Production requirements and/or the specific goals of the module.

What You Will Bring (REQUIRED Qualifications):

  • Diploma in Engineering.

  • Hands on experience working on Chemical Vapour Deposition (CVD) or Dry Etch / Dry Strip / Descum is required.

  • Candidate with strong vacuum and plasma technical knowledge or having similar working experience in equipment maintenance is welcome to apply.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office preferred.

  • Team player, collaborative approach and resourceful.

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.

Years of Experience (Minimum)

  • 3 - 5 years

postedCompany.description:
LUMILEDS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

Lumileds was born from a strategic combination of two successful business groups within the Philips Group – Lumileds and Automotive Lighting into a stand-alone company.  These two units had a long and ongoing history of close collaboration, and this synergistic combination is designed to strengthen the new entity’s LED position in general illumination, as well as its leadership in the automotive lighting industry.  This new entity represents a world-leading lighting components business with a long history of innovation and a proven-track record of delivering industry-leading lighting technologies.

As a world-leading lighting components business, Lumileds supplies high-quality LED components to the lighting industry, as well as LED and conventional lighting components to the automotive industry. The company also holds leading (top 3) market positions in the majority of its markets: General Illumination, Automotive OEM and Aftermarket, and Specialty and Display LED products for the Smartphone and Display segments.

With industry-leading LED performance, advanced LED architecture and novel LED packaging solutions, innovation is truly part of the “Lumileds DNA”.  In the Automotive industry, Lumileds has been at the forefront for over 100 years, creating many industry standards, and introducing many innovations that have led to the advancement and modernization of automotive lighting as we know it today.

Lumileds is embarking on an exciting new journey. By combining the Lumileds and Automotive Lighting businesses of Philips into an stand-alone company, we are creating a industry-leading global lighting components business.
postedCompany.name: LUMILEDS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
